strings._comment: Religions Expanded — English strings. Read by both the JSON build script and the BepInEx plugin.
strings.scenario_edit_religion_key: Pick which religions exist in this scenario. Each starting colonist is randomly given one of the selected religions; some colonists may end up unaligned. If you select none, all colonists start unaligned.
strings.religion_christian_description: Followers worship one God through Christ. Build chapels, cathedrals and bell towers; appoint priests; hold mass.
strings.room_info_chapel_christian: A small place of Christian worship. Requires a shrine and a book stand.
strings.room_info_advanced_chapel_christian: Vanilla advanced chapel. Use Cathedral instead.
strings.room_info_church_christian: A mid-sized Christian house of worship. Requires a grand altar, four pews and a confessional.
strings.room_info_cathedral_christian: A grand Christian cathedral. Requires a grand altar, two large shrines, eight pews, a confessional, three stained-glass windows, four wall paintings, a relic shelf and a book stand.
strings.room_info_bell_tower_christian: A bell tower room. Houses a Christian bell that tolls on the hour.
strings.resource_info_restitutionist_relic: A revered Christian relic. Inspires the faithful.
strings.resource_info_bible_christian: Holy scripture. Reading it raises mood and trains Speechcraft.
strings.resource_info_crucifix_christian: A small portable crucifix. Carrying it gives a slight comfort to the faithful.
strings.resource_info_consecrated_wine_christian: Wine blessed for use in Mass.
strings.building_info_cross_floor_christian: A wooden cross planted on the ground. Marks holy ground and lifts the mood of the faithful.
strings.building_info_cross_wall_christian: A crucifix hung on the wall. Spiritual decoration for any Christian space.
strings.building_info_pew_wood_christian: A simple wooden bench for the faithful to sit through mass.
strings.building_info_pew_padded_christian: A wooden pew softened with linen. More comfortable; makes long sermons bearable.
strings.building_info_grand_altar_christian: An imposing stone altar trimmed with gold. The focal point of any cathedral.
strings.building_info_confessional_christian: A wooden booth where colonists confess to the priest. Required in churches and cathedrals.
strings.building_info_bell_tower_christian: A tall stone tower housing a great bell. Tolls on the hour, lifting the mood of every believer nearby.
strings.building_info_painting_christ_wall: A devotional painting of Christ. Powerful spiritual decoration.
strings.building_info_painting_mary_wall: A devotional painting of the Virgin Mary. Comforting and beautiful.
strings.building_info_painting_saint_wall: A painting depicting a Christian saint.
strings.building_info_stained_glass_christian: A coloured-glass window. Casts holy light on whoever passes.
